name: Microwave Maple Bacon Oven Pancake
recipeIngredient: 12 Slices bacon (about 1/2 Pound) crisply cooked and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour a microwaveable pie plate, 10 x 1 1/2 inches.
2. Beat the baking mix, half cup of the cheese, milk, syrup, sugar, and eggs with a wire whisk or hand beater until only small lumps remain. Pour into the pie plate.
3. Place the pie plate on an inverted microwaveable dinner plate in the microwave oven.
4. Microwave uncovered on high (100%), rotating the pie plate 1/4 turn every 2 minutes, until most of the top no longer appears doughy, about 5 1/2 to 7 1/2 minutes.
5. Sprinkle with remaining cheese and bacon.
6. Microwave uncovered on the inverted dinner plate just until cheese is melted, for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes longer.
7. Serve with maple flavored syrup if desired. Makes 8 servings.
